name: Skool API (SkoolAPI)
description: SkoolAPI is a third-party REST API providing programmatic access to Skool community platform functionality. It covers members, posts, groups, community chat, analytics, and webhooks. The API is in early stages with limited endpoint coverage. All endpoints require API key authentication and an active session. Note: Skool does not publish an official first-party public API; this spec covers the SkoolAPI (docs.skoolapi.com) third-party service.
